turns.content: What brings you in today?
Can't... breathe right. Been three days now. Feels like I'm drowning, doc.
When did this start?
Tuesday. Started as a little cough, but it just kept getting worse. Now I can't catch my breath even sitting still.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Right here in my chest. Feels heavy, like a weight's sitting on it. Ache, not sharp. Just... heavy.
Have you had any fever or chills?
Yeah, I've been sweating something fierce. Chills too, on and off.
What medications are you currently taking?
Blood pressure pills. And some water pill. Can't remember the names. That's it.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Got high blood pressure. And my lungs... I worked construction for years. Might've messed 'em up some.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Not that I know of. Never had a problem.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Just some cough syrup from the drugstore. Didn't help none. Figured I'd come in before it gets real bad.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Lying down makes it worse. Can't sleep on my back at all. Sitting up helps a little, but not enough.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Can't do a thing. Can barely walk to the kitchen. Forget climbing stairs - that's not happening. Just... sitting here's hard enough.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Smoked for 50 years. About a pack a day. Drink a beer now and then, but not much.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Not really. Mama had some breathing trouble when she got older, but nothing like this.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
Had some breathing trouble over the years, but nothing like this. This is the worst it's ever been.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically? Eight. Maybe nine. And emotionally... I'm scared, doc. This ain't normal for me.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's it. Just need you to fix this so I can breathe again.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Not coping at all. Just sitting here waiting. Hoping you can do something. That's all.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Same answer, doc. Just trying to stay calm and get through it. Ain't much else I can do.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I told you, doc. I'm just sitting here. Barely getting by. Can't do much else when you can't breathe.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already said - I'm not coping. I'm just trying to hang on. Can we do something now?
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Look, I've told you three times. I'm not handling it. I'm here 'cause I can't handle it. Can we focus on getting me some air now?
